notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado singles on a line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado hit by pitch. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado hit by pitch. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena doubles (16) on a line drive to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt. J.P. Crawford scores. Josh Naylor to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Luke Raley out at 2nd. Dominic Canzone out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder called out on strikes.
